title: Self Adhesive Hooks, 10 Pcs Stick on Wall Adhesive Colorful Mini Hooks, No Drilling or Nails, Hooks for Key, Bath Towels, Kitchen, Ceiling, Wall, Bathrobe, Door,Towel, Coat
features: 【High Quality】High-quality self-adhesive hooks with waterproof and strong adhesive. The strong, durable, and reliable plastic will not wear out with daily use.

【No Drilling Required】Self-adhesive wall hooks with adhesive that easily adheres to any smooth and flat surface without the need for drilling or nails. Suitable for use on tiles, marble, wood, metal, glass, or ceramic without damaging the surface.

【Minimalist and Aesthetic Design】These adhesive wall hooks feature a minimalist, elegant, and modern design in pastel colors that blends seamlessly into any home. They leave no residue when removed, preserving the appearance of your walls.

【Ease of Use】These bath towel hooks are easy to install. All you have to do is peel off the protective film and stick them to the desired surface. Place the hanging hooks on a smooth, clean, and dry surface, press them for 3 minutes, and wait 24 hours before use.
【Versatile Use】Whether in the bathroom, kitchen, or any other room in the house, these adhesive wall hooks are ideal for hanging towels, tea towels, pictures, and other items without drilling holes.
